Example Calculation Mean v = (2.07 + 1.84 + 1.91 + 2.10) / 4 = 1.98 m s −1 U = (2.10 − 1.84) / 2 = 0.13 m s −1 %U = (0.13 / 1.98) × 100 = 6.6 % (1) (1) (1)  Use of v = u + 2as  a = 1.31 (m s −2 ) Allow ecf for v from (b)(i) Example Calculation 1.98 = 0 + (2 × a × 1.50) a = 1.98 / (2 × 1.50) a = 1.31 m s -2 (1) (1)  The second student carried out the same experiment (1) 1 Total for question 1 8 Number Answer Mark
